spans.content: The pathloss installation program did not complete the Windows registry entry correctly on
shipments before August 1999. Double clicking on a pathloss file (pl4) would start the
program but did not load the file. The procedure to edit the registry and correct this
problem is given in the steps below.
Click Start - Run and enter the command line REGEDIT. Click OK to start the windows

Find
Find what: pl4file
Look at
Keys
Values
Data
Match whole string only
Find Next
Cancel
shown in the directory structure on the right.

pl4file
DefaultIcon
Shell
Open
command
C:\PLW40\plw40.exe %1
and edit the entry as shown.

Edit String
Value name:
(Default)
Value data:
C:\PLW40\plw40.exe %1
OK	Cancel
